'''R2-L1''', also known as simply '''Ell-one''', was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] with the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Starfighter Corps]]. 

It had a programming glitch that made it arrogant, and it was usually paired with [[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]]. One point of friction between them was Till's habit of double-checking status indicators, just in case her astromech overlooked something; Ell-one however insisted that she should break that habit, as it knew its job.

One time, douring a routine space encounter, Essara and L1 had an argument about power allocation.

It flew with her as [[Bravo Seven]] into the [[Battle at TFP-9]], during which L1 for once put Essara's preferred allocation pattern. During that conflict, [[Dren Melne]], flying as [[Bravo Eight]], betrayed Naboo and moved against [[Echo Flight]]. L1 at first prevented Essara from shooting at him, until she had to tell it to override the FoF protocols. <ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />
